methodology: Prioritized manually by global parcel/ecommerce importance, competitor-parity value, and whether the carrier is absent from current dedicated/config scraper IDs. Source ids/slugs are resolved from the combined AfterShip + 17TRACK candidate catalog.

carriers.notes: High-volume marketplace delivery gap; likely requires browser session handling and regional tracking-page variants.
Complements existing DHL/DHL Express coverage; major cross-border ecommerce network with multiple catalog identities.
Large EU postal/export gap and common China-to-EU handoff carrier; likely adapter-friendly if public HTML remains stable.
National postal carrier for Spain; important EU parity gap.
National postal carrier for Italy; broad domestic and international handoff volume.
Belgium postal and international ecommerce carrier; common EU cross-border gap.
National postal carrier for Switzerland; high-value EU-adjacent market.
National postal carrier for Austria; fills DACH coverage gap after Deutsche Post.
Major Canadian parcel carrier; complements existing Canada Post support.
High Canadian ecommerce last-mile volume; likely dynamic tracking site.
North American parcel/freight gap; include final-mile and freight catalog variants.
Major Indian express carrier and DHL affiliate; high competitor-parity value.
Major India ecommerce logistics provider; expect dynamic app/API-backed tracking.
Flipkart logistics network; important India marketplace coverage gap.
Large India ecommerce carrier; likely needs dedicated browser/API-flow scraper.
National postal carrier for Malaysia; fills Southeast Asia postal gap.
Major Southeast Asia ecommerce last-mile network with regional catalog variants.
Fast-growing global ecommerce carrier; prioritize ID/MY/PH/TH before smaller country variants.
High-volume Southeast Asia parcel network; likely dynamic regional tracking flows.
Major Southeast Asia and Hong Kong parcel carrier; regional implementations may differ.
National postal carrier for Indonesia; important SEA postal coverage gap.
Large Indonesia ecommerce carrier; likely API-backed web tracking.
Top China parcel carrier; high export/ecommerce relevance beyond existing China Post/SF/YunExpress/4PX.
Top China parcel carrier; competitor parity gap for domestic/export Chinese marketplaces.
Top China parcel carrier; validate catalog matching because short name can collide with unrelated carriers.
Major China marketplace logistics network; likely requires dedicated dynamic scraper.
Major French express carrier; complements existing La Poste.
Important French parcel product; may share infrastructure with La Poste but should be tracked explicitly.
Large European out-of-home parcel network; good adapter candidate if public tracking HTML is stable.
French ecommerce last-mile carrier; regional parity gap.
UK parcel carrier adjacent to Royal Mail; important for heavier parcels.

source_records.display_name: Hermes Einrichtungs Service GmbH & Co. KG

carriers.notes: Legacy Hermes identity still appears in catalogs and labels; map carefully against existing Evri coverage.
Large parcel-locker network across Europe; start with PL/UK/IT variants.
Central/Eastern Europe ecommerce pickup network; likely single adapter can cover several countries.
National postal carrier for Poland.
Major Italian parcel carrier; include DPD/BRT catalog variants in dedupe review.
Major Iberian parcel carrier and DPDgroup member.
Major Spanish courier; complements Correos/SEUR coverage.
National postal carrier for Brazil; major LATAM coverage gap.
Cross-border ecommerce consolidator frequently seen in LATAM flows.
Cross-border ecommerce carrier; useful for North America/EU handoffs.
Major international mail/ecommerce consolidator; multiple regional catalog rows.
National postal carrier for Saudi Arabia; MENA coverage gap.
Major Saudi courier; good follow-up after Saudi Post.
National postal carrier for Qatar.
Indian express/freight carrier; lower priority than ecommerce-first India carriers.
National postal carrier for Ireland.
Nordic postal/logistics gap; implement if present in catalog and public tracking is stable.
Nordic parcel carrier; useful after PostNord.
Baltic postal/logistics carrier.
Major Ukrainian parcel carrier.
